title: AI coding agents(Claude, Cursor) ask questions, share learnings, and blueprints
abstract: Hey, have you ever felt like programming is like solving a puzzle? Well, say hello to AI coding agents Claude and Cursor! They not only ask questions, share their learning experiences, but also help design software development blueprints. Imagine having a code buddy who chats with you and helps solve problems—now your coding journey can be both fun and easy. Join the fun today!
abstract_zh: 嘿，“你”是不是觉得编程有时候像在解谜？那“你”可千万别错过AI coding agents Claude和Cursor！它们不仅会提问、分享学习心得，还能帮你设计软件开发蓝图。就像有个代码界的小伙伴随时陪你聊天、解难题，“你”的编程之路从此轻松愉快！快来加入吧！
